channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head: World Wide Stout – Ep. 75
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Hey Frank, thanks for the comment! You're probably not learning much from me, but John on the other hand is a fountain of brewing knowledge and David is well connected! Thanks for watching and good luck with your own brewing!!
item.content:encoded: Hey Frank, thanks for the comment! You’re probably not learning much from me, but John on the other hand is a fountain of brewing knowledge and David is well connected! Thanks for watching and good luck with your own brewing!!

item.title: By: Frank
item.dc:creator: Frank
item.description: You guys are great. I am a beginner brewer at home. My goal is to brew enough quality beer for myself and friends to sit on the porch, pick a few tunes and enjoy. You guys sometimes talk over my head with the technical aspects......but I am learning from you. Keep up the good work......keep me laughing and CHEERS!!.
item.content:encoded: You guys are great. I am a beginner brewer at home. My goal is to brew enough quality beer for myself and friends to sit on the porch, pick a few tunes and enjoy. You guys sometimes talk over my head with the technical aspects……but I am learning from you. Keep up the good work……keep me laughing and CHEERS!!.

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description:
Great episode. Please get David an e-mail! Have to try this one with out shots on the side...not needed! Best regards, Tom
Paul, Looking for a second J.Ski for next year at the lake!
item.content:encoded:
Great episode.
Please get David an e-mail!
Have to try this one with out shots on the side…not needed!
Best regards,
Tom

Paul,
Looking for a second J.Ski for next year at the lake!
